name: Triple Vegetable Dish
recipeIngredient: 6 large Potatoes, pared and cubed (3/4 inch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes and onions, covered, in boiling salted water for 15 minutes or until tender. Drain and return to the pan.
2. Melt margarine in a large saucepan. Stir in flour and chicken broth. Cook, stirring constantly until bubbly.
3. Add milk; continue cooking and stirring until the sauce thickens and boils for 1 minute.
4. Stir in liquid from mushrooms. Add mushrooms to potatoes and onions; fold in sauce.
5. Spoon into a 3-quart baking dish and sprinkle bread crumbs in the center.
6. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes, until bubbly and crumbs are toasted.
7. While vegetables bake, trim broccoli and cut florets from stems. Cook florets, covered, in boiling salted water for 8 minutes or until tender. Drain broccoli and arrange in a ring around the edge of the baking dish.
Serves 12
